title: Agent Coordination Usage Record v1
description: Per-model token and estimated-cost telemetry for one coordination lane/agent. A record attributes input/output tokens and estimated cost to exactly one model so consumers can aggregate tokens by model and per-batch token/cost tiles. Token counts and cost are optional metrics: when a value is unknown at report time the producer sends null or the em dash string "—" and never omits the key or fabricates a zero. This schema defines state only; reporting, persistence, provider detection, and UI behavior are separate concerns.

x-storage-key.segment_encoding: UTF-8 bytes; leave ASCII alphanumeric, underscore, and hyphen literal; percent-encode every other byte with uppercase hexadecimal. Applies to every logical-key segment because repo, target, and identifier strings may contain slashes or other separators (for example repo owner/name encodes its slash as %2F).

workspace.description: Tenant/workspace dimension required by ADR 0004. Self-hosted producers use default.

em_dash.description: Explicit unknown marker. The dashboard renders this em dash for a value that was unknown at report time.

optional_token_count.description: A non-negative token count, or null / "—" when unknown at report time. Producers never omit the key and never emit a fabricated zero for an unknown count.

optional_cost.description: A non-negative estimated cost in the record's currency, or null / "—" when unknown at report time. Producers never omit the key and never emit a fabricated zero for an unknown cost.

repo.description: GitHub owner/name the usage is attributed to.

target.description: Issue/PR number or lane target the usage is attributed to.

model.description: Model identifier the tokens and cost are attributed to, for example claude-opus-4-8 or gpt-5.6-sol. One record per model enables tokens-by-model aggregation.

currency.description: Optional ISO 4217 currency code for cost. Absent means USD. This is a unit label, not an optional metric, so it may be omitted.

reported_at.description: Time the usage was reported. Later reports for the same logical key supersede earlier ones.

status_projection.description: Embeddable additive fragment for existing status documents. usage is optional; an omitted or empty section means no usage records were projected. When present, every item must conform to the usage record contract. Existing status properties remain valid beside this section.

usage.description: Optional additive status section. The composite x-unique-key is an unenforced producer invariant because JSON Schema cannot enforce uniqueness by a subset of object properties. Consumers aggregate tokens by model and per-batch token/cost tiles from these records; unknown (null or "—") metrics are excluded from sums rather than counted as zero.
